raw_sql:
SELECT 
    it.info AS info_type_name,
    it.id,
    COUNT(*) AS count
FROM info_type it
WHERE it.info ILIKE '%rating%' OR it.info ILIKE '%vote%' OR it.info ILIKE '%score%'
GROUP BY it.id, it.info
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(mii.info AS NUMERIC), 1) AS rating_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS num_films
FROM movie_info_idx mii
JOIN title t ON t.id = mii.movie_id
WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
  AND t.kind_id = 1  -- movies only
  AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
GROUP BY rating_bucket
ORDER BY rating_bucket;

WITH cohort AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS NUMERIC) AS rating
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
),
genres AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, mi.info AS genre
    FROM movie_info mi
    WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
)
SELECT 
    g.genre,
    COUNT(*) AS total_films,
    ROUND(AVG(c.rating), 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.rating >= 7.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c.rating) AS median_rating
FROM cohort c
JOIN genres g ON g.movie_id = c.movie_id
GROUP BY g.genre
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 100
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

WITH cohort AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS NUMERIC) AS rating
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
),
director_prior_films AS (
    -- Count how many films each director made BEFORE the 2000s film
    SELECT 
        ci.movie_id,
        ci.person_id AS director_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ci2.movie_id) AS prior_film_count
    FROM cast_info ci
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci.movie_id
    JOIN cast_info ci2 ON ci2.person_id = ci.person_id 
        AND ci2.role_id = ci.role_id
    JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = ci2.movie_id
        AND t2.production_year < t.production_year
        AND t2.kind_id = 1
    WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    GROUP BY ci.movie_id, ci.person_id
),
movie_director_exp AS (
    SELECT movie_id, MAX(prior_film_count) AS max_prior_films
    FROM director_prior_films
    GROUP BY movie_id
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN max_prior_films = 0 THEN '0 (debut)'
        WHEN max_prior_films BETWEEN 1 AND 2 THEN '1-2'
        WHEN max_prior_films BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5'
        WHEN max_prior_films BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '6-10'
        ELSE '11+'
    END AS director_experience,
    COUNT(*) AS num_films,
    ROUND(AVG(c.rating), 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.rating >= 7.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated
FROM cohort c
JOIN movie_director_exp mde ON mde.movie_id = c.movie_id
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN max_prior_films = 0 THEN '0 (debut)'
        WHEN max_prior_films BETWEEN 1 AND 2 THEN '1-2'
        WHEN max_prior_films BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5'
        WHEN max_prior_films BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '6-10'
        ELSE '11+'
    END
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((max((count(DISTINCT ci2.movie_id)))) = 0) THEN '0 (debut)'::text WHEN (((max((count(DISTINCT ci2.movie_id)))) >= 1) AND ((max((count(DISTINCT ci2.movie_id)))) <= 2)) THEN '1-2'::text WHEN (((max((count(DISTINCT ci2.movie_id)))) >= 3) AND ((max((count(DISTINCT ci2.movie_id)))) <= 5)) THEN '3-5'::text WHEN (((max((count(DISTINCT ci2.movie_id)))) >= 6) AND ((max((count(DISTINCT ci2.movie_id)))) <= 10)) THEN '6-10'::text ELSE '11+'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH cohort AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS NUMERIC) AS rating
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
),
company_film_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.company_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) AS total_films_produced
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE t.kind_id = 1
      AND mc.company_type_id = 1  -- production companies
    GROUP BY mc.company_id
),
movie_max_company AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        MAX(cfc.total_films_produced) AS biggest_company_size
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_film_counts cfc ON cfc.company_id = mc.company_id
    WHERE mc.company_type_id = 1
    GROUP BY mc.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN biggest_company_size = 1 THEN '1 (single film)'
        WHEN biggest_company_size BETWEEN 2 AND 5 THEN '2-5'
        WHEN biggest_company_size BETWEEN 6 AND 20 THEN '6-20'
        WHEN biggest_company_size BETWEEN 21 AND 100 THEN '21-100'
        ELSE '101+'
    END AS company_size_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS num_films,
    ROUND(AVG(c.rating), 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.rating >= 7.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c.rating) AS median_rating
FROM cohort c
JOIN movie_max_company mmc ON mmc.movie_id = c.movie_id
GROUP BY
    CASE 
        WHEN biggest_company_size = 1 THEN '1 (single film)'
        WHEN biggest_company_size BETWEEN 2 AND 5 THEN '2-5'
        WHEN biggest_company_size BETWEEN 6 AND 20 THEN '6-20'
        WHEN biggest_company_size BETWEEN 21 AND 100 THEN '21-100'
        ELSE '101+'
    END
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((max(cfc.total_films_produced)) = 1) THEN '1 (single film)'::text WHEN (((max(cfc.total_films_produced)) >= 2) AND ((max(cfc.total_films_produced)) <= 5)) THEN '2-5'::text WHEN (((max(cfc.total_films_produced)) >= 6) AND ((max(cfc.total_films_produced)) <= 20)) THEN '6-20'::text WHEN (((max(cfc.total_films_produced)) >= 21) AND ((max(cfc.total_films_produced)) <= 100)) THEN '21-100'::text ELSE '101+'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH cohort AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS NUMERIC) AS rating
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
),
countries AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, mi.info AS country
    FROM movie_info mi
    WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'countries')
)
SELECT 
    c2.country,
    COUNT(*) AS total_films,
    ROUND(AVG(c.rating), 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.rating >= 7.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c.rating) AS median_rating
FROM cohort c
JOIN countries c2 ON c2.movie_id = c.movie_id
GROUP BY c2.country
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 200
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC
LIMIT 25;

WITH cohort AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS NUMERIC) AS rating
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
),
runtimes AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, 
           CAST(NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(mi.info, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), '') AS INTEGER) AS runtime_min
    FROM movie_info mi
    WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
      AND mi.info ~ '^[0-9]'
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN r.runtime_min < 60 THEN '<60 min'
        WHEN r.runtime_min BETWEEN 60 AND 89 THEN '60-89 min'
        WHEN r.runtime_min BETWEEN 90 AND 104 THEN '90-104 min'
        WHEN r.runtime_min BETWEEN 105 AND 119 THEN '105-119 min'
        WHEN r.runtime_min BETWEEN 120 AND 149 THEN '120-149 min'
        ELSE '150+ min'
    END AS runtime_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS num_films,
    ROUND(AVG(c.rating), 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.rating >= 7.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c.rating) AS median_rating
FROM cohort c
JOIN runtimes r ON r.movie_id = c.movie_id
WHERE r.runtime_min BETWEEN 1 AND 600
GROUP BY
    CASE 
        WHEN r.runtime_min < 60 THEN '<60 min'
        WHEN r.runtime_min BETWEEN 60 AND 89 THEN '60-89 min'
        WHEN r.runtime_min BETWEEN 90 AND 104 THEN '90-104 min'
        WHEN r.runtime_min BETWEEN 105 AND 119 THEN '105-119 min'
        WHEN r.runtime_min BETWEEN 120 AND 149 THEN '120-149 min'
        ELSE '150+ min'
    END
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((NULLIF(regexp_replace(mi.info, '[^0-9]'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer < 60) THEN '<60 min'::text WHEN (((NULLIF(regexp_replace(mi.info, '[^0-9]'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer >= 60) AND ((NULLIF(regexp_replace(mi.info, '[^0-9]'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer <= 89)) THEN '60-89 min'::text WHEN (((NULLIF(regexp_replace(mi.info, '[^0-9]'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer >= 90) AND ((NULLIF(regexp_replace(mi.info, '[^0-9]'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer <= 104)) THEN '90-104 min'::text WHEN (((NULLIF(regexp_replace(mi.info, '[^0-9]'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer >= 105) AND ((NULLIF(regexp_replace(mi.info, '[^0-9]'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer <= 119)) THEN '105-119 min'::text WHEN (((NULLIF(regexp_replace(mi.info, '[^0-9]'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer >= 120) AND ((NULLIF(regexp_replace(mi.info, '[^0-9]'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer <= 149)) THEN '120-149 min'::text ELSE '150+ min'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH cohort AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS NUMERIC) AS rating
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
),
cast_sizes AS (
    SELECT ci.movie_id, COUNT(*) AS cast_size
    FROM cast_info ci
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci.movie_id
    WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    GROUP BY ci.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN cs.cast_size = 1 THEN '1'
        WHEN cs.cast_size BETWEEN 2 AND 5 THEN '2-5'
        WHEN cs.cast_size BETWEEN 6 AND 15 THEN '6-15'
        WHEN cs.cast_size BETWEEN 16 AND 40 THEN '16-40'
        WHEN cs.cast_size BETWEEN 41 AND 100 THEN '41-100'
        ELSE '101+'
    END AS cast_size_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS num_films,
    ROUND(AVG(c.rating), 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.rating >= 7.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c.rating) AS median_rating
FROM cohort c
JOIN cast_sizes cs ON cs.movie_id = c.movie_id
GROUP BY
    CASE 
        WHEN cs.cast_size = 1 THEN '1'
        WHEN cs.cast_size BETWEEN 2 AND 5 THEN '2-5'
        WHEN cs.cast_size BETWEEN 6 AND 15 THEN '6-15'
        WHEN cs.cast_size BETWEEN 16 AND 40 THEN '16-40'
        WHEN cs.cast_size BETWEEN 41 AND 100 THEN '41-100'
        ELSE '101+'
    END
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((count(*)) = 1) THEN '1'::text WHEN (((count(*)) >= 2) AND ((count(*)) <= 5)) THEN '2-5'::text WHEN (((count(*)) >= 6) AND ((count(*)) <= 15)) THEN '6-15'::text WHEN (((count(*)) >= 16) AND ((count(*)) <= 40)) THEN '16-40'::text WHEN (((count(*)) >= 41) AND ((count(*)) <= 100)) THEN '41-100'::text ELSE '101+'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH cohort AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS NUMERIC) AS rating
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
),
keyword_ratings AS (
    SELECT 
        k.keyword,
        COUNT(*) AS num_films,
        ROUND(AVG(c.rating), 3) AS avg_rating,
        ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.rating >= 7.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated
    FROM cohort c
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = c.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
    GROUP BY k.keyword
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 150
)
SELECT keyword, num_films, avg_rating, pct_high_rated
FROM keyword_ratings
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC
LIMIT 30;

WITH cohort AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS NUMERIC) AS rating
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
),
runtimes AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, 
           CAST(NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(mi.info, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), '') AS INTEGER) AS runtime_min
    FROM movie_info mi
    WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
      AND mi.info ~ '^[0-9]'
),
genres AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, mi.info AS genre
    FROM movie_info mi
    WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
)
SELECT 
    g.genre,
    CASE 
        WHEN r.runtime_min < 90 THEN '<90 min'
        WHEN r.runtime_min BETWEEN 90 AND 119 THEN '90-119 min'
        ELSE '120+ min'
    END AS runtime_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS num_films,
    ROUND(AVG(c.rating), 2) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.rating >= 7.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated
FROM cohort c
JOIN runtimes r ON r.movie_id = c.movie_id
JOIN genres g ON g.movie_id = c.movie_id
WHERE r.runtime_min BETWEEN 1 AND 600
  AND g.genre IN ('Drama', 'Comedy', 'Thriller', 'Biography', 'Animation', 'Horror', 'Action')
GROUP BY g.genre,
    CASE 
        WHEN r.runtime_min < 90 THEN '<90 min'
        WHEN r.runtime_min BETWEEN 90 AND 119 THEN '90-119 min'
        ELSE '120+ min'
    END
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 50
ORDER BY g.genre, avg_rating DESC;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((NULLIF(regexp_replace(mi.info, '[^0-9]'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer < 90) THEN '<90 min'::text WHEN (((NULLIF(regexp_replace(mi.info, '[^0-9]'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer >= 90) AND ((NULLIF(regexp_replace(mi.info, '[^0-9]'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer <= 119)) THEN '90-119 min'::text ELSE '120+ min'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH cohort AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS NUMERIC) AS rating
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id AND mii.info_type_id = 101
    WHERE t.kind_id = 1
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
),
votes AS (
    SELECT mii.movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS INTEGER) AS vote_count
    FROM movie_info_idx mii
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = 100
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN v.vote_count < 100    THEN '1-99'
        WHEN v.vote_count < 1000   THEN '100-999'
        WHEN v.vote_count < 10000  THEN '1K-9.9K'
        WHEN v.vote_count < 100000 THEN '10K-99K'
        ELSE '100K+'
    END AS vote_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS num_films,
    ROUND(AVG(c.rating), 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.rating >= 7.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c.rating) AS median_rating,
    ROUND(AVG(v.vote_count)) AS avg_votes
FROM cohort c
JOIN votes v ON v.movie_id = c.movie_id
GROUP BY
    CASE 
        WHEN v.vote_count < 100    THEN '1-99'
        WHEN v.vote_count < 1000   THEN '100-999'
        WHEN v.vote_count < 10000  THEN '1K-9.9K'
        WHEN v.vote_count < 100000 THEN '10K-99K'
        ELSE '100K+'
    END
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((mii_1.info)::integer < 100) THEN '1-99'::text WHEN ((mii_1.info)::integer < 1000) THEN '100-999'::text WHEN ((mii_1.info)::integer < 10000) THEN '1K-9.9K'::text WHEN ((mii_1.info)::integer < 100000) THEN '10K-99K'::text ELSE '100K+'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH cohort AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS NUMERIC) AS rating
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id AND mii.info_type_id = 101
    WHERE t.kind_id = 1
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
),
votes AS (
    SELECT mii.movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS INTEGER) AS vote_count
    FROM movie_info_idx mii
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = 100
),
runtimes AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id,
           CAST(NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(mi.info, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), '') AS INTEGER) AS runtime_min
    FROM movie_info mi
    WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
      AND mi.info ~ '^[0-9]'
),
genres AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, mi.info AS genre
    FROM movie_info mi
    WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
)
SELECT 
    g.genre,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN v.vote_count >= 10000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100, 1) AS pct_high_vote,
    ROUND(AVG(r.runtime_min)) AS avg_runtime,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.movie_id) AS num_films,
    ROUND(AVG(c.rating), 3) AS avg_rating
FROM cohort c
JOIN genres g ON g.movie_id = c.movie_id
LEFT JOIN votes v ON v.movie_id = c.movie_id
LEFT JOIN runtimes r ON r.movie_id = c.movie_id
WHERE r.runtime_min BETWEEN 1 AND 600
  AND g.genre IN ('Animation','Biography','History','War','Drama','Comedy','Action','Horror','Thriller','Crime','Documentary')
GROUP BY g.genre
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.movie_id) >= 100
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

),

runtimes AS (

    FROM movie_info mi
    WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
      AND mi.info ~ '^[0-9]'
),
genres AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, mi.info AS genre
    FROM movie_info mi

)
SELECT 
    g.genre,

    ROUND(AVG(r.runtime_min)) AS avg_runtime,

raw_sql:
WITH cohort AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS NUMERIC) AS rating
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id AND mii.info_type_id = 101
    WHERE t.kind_id = 1
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
),
votes AS (
    SELECT mii.movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS BIGINT) AS vote_count
    FROM movie_info_idx mii
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = 100
      AND mii.info ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      AND LENGTH(mii.info) <= 9
),
runtimes AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id,
           CAST(mi.info AS INTEGER) AS runtime_min
    FROM movie_info mi
    WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
      AND mi.info ~ '^[0-9]{1,4}$'
),
genres AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, mi.info AS genre
    FROM movie_info mi
    WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
)
SELECT 
    g.genre,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN v.vote_count >= 10000 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100, 1) AS pct_high_vote,
    ROUND(AVG(r.runtime_min)) AS avg_runtime,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.movie_id) AS num_films,
    ROUND(AVG(c.rating), 3) AS avg_rating
FROM cohort c
JOIN genres g ON g.movie_id = c.movie_id
LEFT JOIN votes v ON v.movie_id = c.movie_id
LEFT JOIN runtimes r ON r.movie_id = c.movie_id
WHERE r.runtime_min BETWEEN 1 AND 600
  AND g.genre IN ('Animation','Biography','History','War','Drama','Comedy','Action','Horror','Thriller','Crime','Documentary')
GROUP BY g.genre
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.movie_id) >= 100
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

WITH cohort AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, CAST(mii.info AS NUMERIC) AS rating
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id AND mii.info_type_id = 101
    WHERE t.kind_id = 1
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
),
runtimes AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, CAST(mi.info AS INTEGER) AS runtime_min
    FROM movie_info mi
    WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
      AND mi.info ~ '^[0-9]{1,4}$'
),
genres AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, mi.info AS genre
    FROM movie_info mi
    WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
      AND mi.info IN ('Biography','War','History','Drama','Crime','Thriller','Comedy','Action','Horror','Animation')
),
-- Assign each film its primary genre (highest-ranked by quality)
ranked_genre AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (movie_id) movie_id, genre
    FROM genres
    ORDER BY movie_id,
        CASE genre
            WHEN 'Biography' THEN 1 WHEN 'War' THEN 2 WHEN 'History' THEN 3
            WHEN 'Drama' THEN 4 WHEN 'Crime' THEN 5 WHEN 'Animation' THEN 6
            WHEN 'Thriller' THEN 7 WHEN 'Comedy' THEN 8 WHEN 'Action' THEN 9
            WHEN 'Horror' THEN 10 ELSE 99
        END
)
SELECT 
    rg.genre,
    CASE 
        WHEN r.runtime_min < 90   THEN '<90 min'
        WHEN r.runtime_min < 120  THEN '90-119 min'
        ELSE '120+ min'
    END AS runtime_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS num_films,
    ROUND(AVG(c.rating), 2) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.rating >= 7.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated
FROM cohort c
JOIN ranked_genre rg ON rg.movie_id = c.movie_id
JOIN runtimes r ON r.movie_id = c.movie_id
WHERE r.runtime_min BETWEEN 60 AND 300
GROUP BY rg.genre,
    CASE 
        WHEN r.runtime_min < 90   THEN '<90 min'
        WHEN r.runtime_min < 120  THEN '90-119 min'
        ELSE '120+ min'
    END
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 40
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC
LIMIT 20;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((mi.info)::integer < 90) THEN '<90 min'::text WHEN ((mi.info)::integer < 120) THEN '90-119 min'::text ELSE '120+ min'::text END)
